description: Minimal runnable demo that asks Ralph to add a starter CHANGELOG.md file.

userStories.title: Create a starter changelog
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a starter CHANGELOG.md so that the repository has a clear place to track future releases.
acceptanceCriteria: Add CHANGELOG.md at the repository root
userStories.notes: This is a safe first-run example for verifying the Ralph loop end to end.
